hoi4modutilities.useConditionInFocus.des: Show conditions in the focus tree preview. Reloading is required after changing this.
hoi4modutilities.eventTreePreview.title: Event Tree Preview
hoi4modutilities.eventTreePreview.desc: Enable the event tree preview feature. Reloading is required after changing this.
hoi4modutilities.sharedFocusIndex.title: Shared Focus Index
hoi4modutilities.sharedFocusIndex.desc: Build an index of shared focuses for cross-file lookups. Reloading is required after changing this.
hoi4modutilities.gfxIndex.title: GFX Index
hoi4modutilities.gfxIndex.desc: Build an index of GFX sprite definitions. Uses more memory. Reloading is required after changing this.
hoi4modutilities.localisationIndex.title: Localisation Index
hoi4modutilities.localisationIndex.desc: Build a localisation index to show translated text in previews. Uses more memory. Reloading is required after changing this.
hoi4modutilities.installPath.title: Install Path
hoi4modutilities.installPath.desc: Hearts of Iron IV install path. If you are on web, you should press Ctrl+Shift+P, and type "Select HOI4 Install Path" command instead of this setting.
hoi4modutilities.loadDlcContents.title: Load DLC Contents
hoi4modutilities.loadDlcContents.desc: Whether to load DLC images when previewing files. Enabling this will use more memory.
hoi4modutilities.modFile.title: Working Mod File
hoi4modutilities.modFile.desc: Path to the working .mod file. This file is used to read replace_path. If not specified, will use first .mod file in first folder of the workspace.
hoi4modutilities.preview.title: Preview HOI4 file
hoi4modutilities.previewworld.title: Preview World Map
hoi4modutilities.scanreferences.title: Scan References
hoi4modutilities.selecthoifolder.title: Select HOI4 Install Path
hoi4modutilities.selectmodfile.title: Select Mod File
hoi4modutilities.enableSupplyArea.title: Enable Supply Area
hoi4modutilities.enableSupplyArea.desc: If you are developing mod for HOI4(version<=1.10). Check this to enable supply area.
